mission.title: kcp: ✨ Update to Kubernetes 1.26.3
mission.description:
## Summary
Update to Kubernetes 1.26.3.

## Todos
- [x] Unit tests pass
- [x] Boilerplate
- [x] Lint
- [ ] Update go.mod to real Kube branch
- [x] Enable ValidatingAdmissionPolicy

## Related issue(s)

Fixes #2772

steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
